name: White Halo
description: Objects or locations marked with a plain white halo are considered “out-of-game” and should be ignored. A white halo on a red or green background means that the object or location should be ignored by default, but some Powers and abilities allow a character to see or interact with them.

name: Black Key
description: An item marked with a black key is in-game, but cannot be opened, moved, or broken by default. Some black key signs will include written conditions about who can open the item.

name: Yellow Lock
description: Areas marked with a yellow lock are not allowed to be entered by players for any reason, unless given express permission by a staff member.

name: Blue Exclamation Point
description: This marker is generally posted at the entrance to an area. It means that there is important game mechanic information that must be conveyed to players before they enter the area. Players should look for an accompanying written sheet and read it before proceeding.
